description: Bidirectional KP diff between client local store and server. Replaces publishKeyPackages action=sync for full reconciliation. Server returns BOTH directions of the diff (serverOnly + localOnly) and does NOT auto-delete on either side.

localHashes.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 hashes of every KP the client claims to have locally.

schemaVersion.description: Reconciliation protocol version. Always 2 for this endpoint.

serverOnly.description: Hashes server has but client did not claim. Client SHOULD delete from local manifest if it can't find them, OR notify user that account has stale key material from a previous install.

localOnly.description: Hashes client claims but server doesn't have. Client SHOULD re-publish via publishKeyPackages. Server will NOT auto-delete these.

total.description: Total KP count on server for this device after the call (excluding dead KPs).

deviceVerified.description: True iff local_hashes ⊆ server_hashes AND server_hashes ⊆ local_hashes ∪ {expired for this device}. Verified status is the green-light signal for inviters to use this device's KPs.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Caller is not the owner of deviceId.
